title: Health Questionnaire
subtitle: Takes about 5 minutes

parq.title: Physical Activity Readiness
parq.q1: Has a doctor ever said you have a heart condition?
parq.q2: Do you feel pain in your chest during physical activity?
parq.q3: Have you had chest pain in the past month while not exercising?
parq.q4: Do you ever lose balance due to dizziness or lose consciousness?
parq.q5: Do you have a bone or joint problem that could worsen with exercise?
parq.q6: Is a doctor currently prescribing medication for blood pressure or heart condition?
parq.q7: Do you know of any other reason you should not do physical activity?
parq.warning: We recommend consulting a doctor before starting an exercise program.

consent: I understand this is for informational purposes only and not medical advice.
